The '''mallakin''' was an avian native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. The creature's natural habitat was within the leaves of the world's giant [[Wroshyr tree/Legends|wroshyr trees]], where it would hide and await its prey, commonly small insects.

==Appearances==
*''[[A Forest Apart]]'' {{Mo}}
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
